title: EASTERN OREGON DETOXIFICATION CENTER - 211info
text: EASTERN OREGON COUNTY DETOXIFICATION CENTER EASTERN OREGON DETOXIFICATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides social and medically monitored detoxification services that focus on safe stabilization of clients. May also facilitate referrals to other addiction and/or medical services for discharged clients. 4708 NW Pioneer Place Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Age 18 and older who are currently using alcohol and/or drugs or are in physical danger due to withdrawal Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 278-2558 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 278-2558 Detox Business Line Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Must complete pre-intake eligibility and use history screening before admittance. FEES: Accepts all major insurance and Medicaid. Sliding scale fee for private pay or extremely low-income clients. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake but would prefer Photo ID and insurance information if availiable. AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: Detoxification If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EASTERN OREGON COUNTY DETOXIFICATION CENTER
